name: channel
checklist: Spawn at the coast with a lit campfire at your feet, holding raw venison, bandages, beans, and water bottles.
Stand IN the fire and use raw venison (F key, or the Tab USE button) — a ~3s cast runs, then it cooks to Cooked Venison with no HP loss.
Start the cook, then walk out of the fire before it finishes — the cast cancels with the notice 'Moved away from the fire' and the venison is NOT consumed.
Use raw venison while away from any fire — nothing happens except the notice 'Stand within 5m of a fire to cook it' (raw venison can no longer be eaten raw).
Use a bandage — a ~1.2s cast runs, then HP rises. Start it and immediately move — it cancels and the bandage is NOT consumed.
Eat beans / drink a water bottle — each is a short ~1.2s cast; food/water rise on completion, and moving mid-cast cancels with nothing consumed.
Note: there is no on-screen cast bar yet (that is the next milestone) — you feel the delay and see the inventory change only when the cast completes.
